hotel_name: Apec SeaView Sun-Condotel (Apec SeaView Sun-Condotel Tuy Hoa)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Tết giá cao
Phòng đắt

reviews.title: I was booked the queen room they give me the twin room
It's not a hotel
reviews.text: It's a owner rental. No staff nor use of the facilities inside the building. We can pay to use the the facilities as I am told. The room is clean, but you shouldn't expect the service as you normally receive from a hotel. Breakfast is extra.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Vị trí trung tâm. Bãi gửi xe qua đêm 35k vào ra thoải mái ko tính thêm phí
reviews.negatives: Phòng hơi nhỏ để mở cái vali là hết lối đi. Thang máy nhiều nhưng chờ hơi lâu. Kính ban công cao nhưng bẩn nên mất 50% giá trị khung cảnh

reviews.title: Cliffys review
reviews.text: Don't be decived by the pretty pictures which clearly shows a pool ang gym .BUT you have to pay extra to use them BIG THUMBS DOWN FROM ME .booked the hotel solely because it had a pool 90k each extra to use

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Nhân viên phục vụ và tư vấn tận tình
Phòng đẹp, sạch sẽ, đủ tiện nghi

reviews.title: Vừa ổn
reviews.text: Thuận tiện ngay trung tâm, vậy thôi hà

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
The staff's attitude was rude, didn't really support us with the check-in section. 
Swiming pool and gym are not free like they mentioned.

reviews.title: Room only without any service
reviews.text: No swimming icludes as well. Only room for rent

reviews.title: Nice apartment
reviews.text: The location is good, it’s on the main street of Phu Yen. However,  the blanket is small for doubles. The towers are not clean!

reviews.title: The location is good
reviews.text:
The location is good, it’s in the main street of Phu Yen! It’s a little bit far from the beach!
The room is nice, however, pillowcases are dirty & smelly!! Maybe they didn’t change for the new customers.

reviews.title: Need more details on facilities access
reviews.text:
I have to paid overprice parking overnight
The advertisement mentioned access to the pool but I have to pay as well

reviews.title: Having a nice stay
reviews.text: This apartment provides a nice stay during our visit to Phu Yen.

reviews.title: clean
reviews.text: Basically, my family only stays here to sleep, but I find it quite okay. The family can cook if they want to, as there is a kitchen available, but we need to bring our own utensils (pots and pans, etc.). The room also has an iron.
reviews.room_type: Partial Sea View Family Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Good clean room and location
reviews.text: A good clean room, great view, but not serviced daily. Fridge didn’t work at all. Busy hotel, location is good. Plenty of cafes and restaurants in the area. Walking distance to the beach, 0.5km.

reviews.title: Beautiful view at Apec
reviews.text: I would recommended APEC for vacation rental.  The room had beautiful view, and the receptionist had accommodated everything I asked for.  Very happy with my stay

reviews.title: Nice location and clean
reviews.text: I didn't like paying 200k for gym and infinity pool or 35k a day parking. Parking was easy and very central. Decent place but some small hotels down the street are equally acceptable for a rest stop and half the price.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Yên tỉnh,  trải nghiệm tốt

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: With this price, I don't ask for anything more, but if possible, it should be checked again before handing over the room; it should be spacious and comfortable. I slept pretty well, so it would be good to provide extra towels for guests staying 2 nights and add some drinking water! As for the parking fee, it is charged separately at 20k per hour for cars, which I find quite high. The host is friendly and cheerful, and splitting the cost among guests, this price is okay.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Very good
reviews.response:
Dear Thuy!  Thank you for choosing Apec Sun Hotel Phu Yen for your stay in Phu Yen.
 Your satisfaction and reviews are the motivation for our hotel to be further improved.
 Wishing you a very healthy and happy new year.
 The hotel looks forward to welcoming you again in the near future.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The room is small but fully equipped. The toilet initially smelled due to the sewer odor, and the air conditioner didn't cool quickly. After providing feedback, the room service immediately addressed the issues, so I was quite satisfied. After that, the room was very good. The bed was comfortable and clean. If I have the chance, I will come back.

reviews.title: Apec Mandala Condotel Tuy Hoa
reviews.text: Great location and value for money.  Friendly host who supported and provided local information.

reviews.title: Chọn không cần đắn đo.
reviews.text: Condotel nằm ở đại lộ sát biển, trong khu phức hợp gồm condotel, hotel, mall... tốt nhất nhì biển Tuy Hòa. Chỗ đỗ xe rộng thoài mái như đường phố nơi đây. Phòng đẹp, view tốt. Giá cả rất mềm đối với một cơ sở 5* đã làm ngạc nhiên các bạn tôi!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room with Side Sea View

reviews.title: nice and clean
reviews.text: pretty clean but look for old trash from previous people cause they tend to smell
reviews.response:
Dear Doan!  Thank you for choosing Apec Sun Hotel Phu Yen for your stay in Phu Yen.
 Your satisfaction and reviews are the motivation for our hotel to be further improved.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Good location and very clean.
reviews.response:
Dear Maria! Cảm ơn bạn đã lựa chọn khách sạn Apec Sun Hotel Phú Yên cho kỳ nghỉ tại Phú yên. 
Sự hài lòng và những đánh giá của bạn là động lực cho khách sạn mình được hoàn thiện tốt hơn nữa. 
Chúc bạn năm mới thật nhiều sức khoẻ và chuyến đi vui vẻ.
Khách sạn rất mong sẽ lại được chào đón bạn vào 1 dịp gần nhất.

reviews.title: Great Views!
reviews.text: Warning - the elevators are a bit tricky and we got stuck for 15 min once not being able to access our floor. Otherwise great spot!

reviews.title: Great for value
reviews.text: Great location, not really close to the beach but you can always rent a motorcyle. One of the cheap decent place in Tuy Hoa

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is fine, relatively clean. My family booked 2 rooms but they were assigned to 2 locations that are very far apart, which is very unreasonable.

reviews.title: Feedback
reviews.text: The location was perfect, close to the beach. The owner friendly and very helpful, always ready to assist with any requests.

reviews.title: Tốt
reviews.text: Giá OK, view ổn, vị trí ổn

reviews.title: It's a good accommodation.
reviews.text: Overall, it is a good accommodation. However, due to the timing being during the Vietnam holiday period, the average price of all accommodations in Tuy Hoa has increased by about five times, making it very difficult to find a place. I was lucky to secure this accommodation for 1.5 million VND, which is a bit more expensive than usual, but much cheaper compared to other places. The accommodation has two beds, is suitable for three people, clean, has a good view, and the bathtub is quite nice. It also comes with a washing machine and kitchen facilities, and the location seems good. Next time, I would like to stay at the regular price.

reviews.title: Almost perfect!
reviews.room_type: Partial Sea View Room for 2 Adults

reviews.title: Short Stay
reviews.text: APEC was as good it was gonna get. The room was a studio hotel room, not too big, but jut enough for 1-2ppl. Very comfortable and clean space with the amenities that you need. The rooms are privately owned, not part of hotel for my booking, so they were very receptive to my requests. It's also at a very convenient location in downtown.

reviews.title: Worth the price range.
reviews.text:
- Basic room for those who like simplicity, cleanliness, close to the center
- Friendly and enthusiastic host
- Early check-in free of charge
- Paid parking (send vehicle number and stay dates to the host for free parking)
- 24-hour swimming pool fee 165k/2 people (contact host)

In summary, it’s worth the money, highly recommend 👍👍👍

reviews.title: APEC CONDOTEL
reviews.text: It's still new and very clean, we rented an apartment with a balcony, so it's very airy. The room has all the necessary basic amenities equivalent to 3-4 stars. All members of our group are satisfied.
reviews.response: Cảm ơn quý khách hàng đã có trải nghiệm tốt ở khách sạn Apec Seaview Sun. Chúc quý khách hàng có nhiều sức khoẻ

reviews.title: Worth trying
reviews.text: The room is clean, very close to Nghinh Phong. The service is all good, and the price is not too high. They also support late check-out, so I find it okay.
reviews.response: Cảm ơn quý khách hàng đã có trải nghiệm tốt ở khách sạn Apec Seaview Sun. Chúc quý khách hàng có nhiều sức khoẻ

reviews.title: Great location, and hotel.
reviews.text: Had a great time on my stay. Thank you.

reviews.title: A hotel worth experiencing.
reviews.text: From the rooms to the lobby, everything is very beautiful and clean, featuring the characteristics of the Central Highlands. Phu Yen is a new tourist destination in Vietnam, very pristine and peaceful. Families can come here to experience the tranquility and the local specialties.

reviews.title: You are an enthusiastic, lovely host, supporting customers.
reviews.text: The host is enthusiastic, friendly, and very supportive of customers.
reviews.response: Cảm ơn quý khách hàng đã có 1 kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời. KÍNH CHÚC quý khách năm mới An khang thịnh vượng

reviews.title: Friendly host. The room is nice and very clean. If I come back, I will continue to support.
reviews.text: Friendly host. The room is nice and very clean, I really like it. I will recommend it and continue to support!

reviews.title: Friendly staff
reviews.text: The room is beautiful and clean, I accidentally booked twice, and the hotel happily canceled for free.

reviews.title: Beautiful
reviews.text: The new apartment is clean, but it is a bit inconvenient to pay 30k for overnight parking, from 9 PM to morning it costs 40k extra. Overall, I would give it 10 points for quality and service.
reviews.response:
Dạ. Cảm ơn anh chị đã có kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại khách sạn. 
Về việc gửi xe dưới hầm. Bên em đã hỗ trợ mình đăng ký để gửi hầm ra vô miễn phí rồi ạ.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Điều hoà hơi yếu. Có thêm cây quạt thì tốt

reviews.title: Should experience
reviews.text: Very suitable for small families wanting to enjoy a sea view like at home. Every time my child goes back to the room, they really like it. It's a bit of a pity that the infinity pool of the hotel is not included.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Triple Room for 3 People

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel makes a strong impression right from the beginning with its luxurious lobby and a very professional, friendly front desk staff. The rooms are kept clean, equipped with modern amenities, and feature elegant design, providing an ideal space for relaxation. The services here are highly appreciated by customers, from the staff's enthusiastic attitude to the quality of the diverse breakfast and well-maintained accompanying facilities. The hotel's location is extremely advantageous, conveniently connecting to tourist attractions and the central area, making transportation easy. In summary, this is a worthwhile accommodation that offers a wonderful experience and comes highly recommended.

reviews.title: Amenities, beautiful view
reviews.text: Clean room, beautiful view, enthusiastic staff support. Sufficiently meets the needs of both large groups and children.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Triple Room for 3 People

reviews.title: Quick support
reviews.text: Good prices, friendly staff, timely support, clean and beautiful rooms, central location, convenient for renting cars and getting to tourist attractions.
reviews.response: Cảm ơn khách hàng đã có 1 kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời bên hệ thống Khách sạn bên em ạ

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.text: So với giá tiền thì tuyệt vời không cần gì phải bàn

reviews.title: You should book a room here.
reviews.text: The room is brand new with a beautiful view. I arrived earlier than the check-in time, but the owner helped me check in early without any extra charge. Parking is free in the basement, but I had to contact the owner for assistance. Thank you to the super friendly host!

reviews.title: It was amazing with the trip.
reviews.text: Low price compared to the beautiful and super clean room quality, with the owner providing support in introducing good eating places.

reviews.title: Hotel review
reviews.text: The hotel is comfortable, warm, and located right in the city center, making it easy to get around. I feel at ease staying here.

reviews.title: Beautiful room - Friendly staff
reviews.text: The room is not too spacious but has modern furnishings. The staff is supportive, enthusiastic, and friendly, allowing early check-in as soon as there is a vacant room. I am sincerely grateful for the comfortable and friendly place during a trip filled with joyful memories.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Giường gối sạch sẽ thơm tho êm mịn lắm. Lần sau mình sẽ ở nữa

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The price is very good, the owner is very friendly and lovely. The room is clean and right in the center. It's worth more than expected.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very clean and comfortable

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Nice and clean apt. Feel so welcomed by the staff

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I recommend it. The room is good, with a balcony that has a slight view of the sea. The only inconvenience is that there is no laundry. Other than that, everything is fine. They also arranged for a motorcycle rental. The caretaker came to welcome us upon arrival and explained things in great detail. They provided a contact number in case we had questions or needed assistance. Overall, it was good, very okay.

reviews.title: Everything is 10 points.
reviews.text: From the location, amenities, to the enthusiasm for cleanliness, there is really nothing to discuss. This is my first experience with this type of Condotel service, and it's been wonderful.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: A place that is affordable and has a beautiful view. Clean and fully equipped. The owner is always cheerful and helpful with everything since I checked in. It's very reasonable to choose such a good place to stay.

reviews.title: 1 night in Tuy Hoa city
reviews.text: The room is clean and tidy, but the air conditioning is a bit weak, difficult to adjust the temperature, there is a coffee cup but no spoon.

reviews.title: Luxury accommodation
reviews.text: The room is clean, centrally located, affordable, and there is 24/7 support for storing luggage at the reception, so anyone who arrives early can leave their bags and go sightseeing until check-in time.

reviews.title: It’s a big
reviews.text: The apec is beautiful and big building. Room is nice clean and spacious , magnificent view of ocean . Just short walk to a  long ocean beaches . Staff  pleasant to deal with . Thank you

reviews.title: good
reviews.text: excellent

reviews.title: Nothing to criticize at all, very good.
reviews.text: The room price is very reasonable, the room is clean and fully equipped! 8/10

reviews.title: Đáng so với giá tiền
reviews.text: Chủ nhà nhiệt tình, vị trí thuận tiện, nhìn chung ok so với giá tiền

reviews.title: Room review
reviews.text: The room is spacious and clean, very comfortable with all necessary utensils and supplies. The kitchen is equipped, and the balcony view is just perfect!
reviews.room_type: Premier Sea View Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text: Highly recomend staying. Like home

reviews.title: Phòng mới view đẹp giá siêu hời
reviews.text: Mọi thứ đều rất ổn áp không có gì để chê, thuê xe của host nên gửi dưới hầm ko mất thêm phí gì hết. View rộng bao quát ra công viên và cả biển; xung quanh nhiều tiện ích,...

reviews.title: Good price, nice place
reviews.text: I am really happy to stay here as everything is good. A convenient place with very low prices, good service, nice staffs

reviews.title: Fantastic Value and Service
reviews.text:
We had a 1 night stay here after checking out of a nearby 5* star hotel (which isn't actually a 5* star hotel!). 

Upon checking in a Apec we were given a complimentary upgrade as a larger room was available. There was an issue with the bed sheets, we contacted the chexk in staff and a cleaner was in our room in less than 5 minutes to resolve the issue. Fantastic service. 

The room was very spacious, clean and to a high standard. Pillows and mattress were very comfortable. 

We wished we had stayed here for the full duration of our trip and had not bothered going to the 5* Star hotel at all. We will book this rental again next time we are in Tuy Hoa. 

A big thank you to the staff, we had a great stay. 

Many thanks

reviews.title: look like 5 star hotel
reviews.text:
facility, location & service are wonderful,
very much pleasured to stay at this appartment,
the price is very much under delivered value,
will stay at this hotel again if visit Tuy Hoa,

reviews.title: New Facilities, Stunning Views, and Amazing Host
reviews.text: This beachfront apartment was a delightful find. The facilities were new, clean, and in perfect condition. The view of the beach was stunning, setting a serene atmosphere for our stay. The spacious room comfortably accommodated two people, and the nearby F&B options were convenient. What truly made our stay special was the host, who was exceptionally friendly and accommodating. I wholeheartedly recommend this apartment for a fantastic getaway.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.text: Nội thất đầy đủ, view cực đẹp, giá cả  hợp lý

reviews.title: Good location and nice view
reviews.text:
The Apec building is next to Vincom center. The room is small but clean and comfortable. 
You can park the car at the parking zone right at the front of the building.

reviews.title: Nơi nghỉ ngơi tiện nghi cho việc du lịch
reviews.text:
Nằm ở trên đường trung tâm của Tuy Hòa, chỉ 3-10p đi mọi chỗ ăn local rất tiện, tòa nhà kế bên là Vincom ,bạn có thể mua đồ sinh hoạt ở đó rất đầy đủ. Bạn nhân viên nhiệt tình và nhanh nhẹn, flexible xử lí các vấn đề rất hay.  
Phòng sạch, khá mới mẻ, thiết bị điện từ và thẻ từ cổng tiện nghi.
Các bạn nên mướn xe máy qua bạn nhân viên này vì xe của tòa nhà, việc ra vào thuận tiện chỉ quẹt thẻ. Xe cũng khá mới, chạy êm. 
Còn hồ bơi sịn sò có 2 chỗ: Rooftop (L28) hoặc Lầu 6. Khi mua vé, bạn chỉ cần báo bạn nhân viên trước 15ph là có ngay thẻ bơi 24h unlimited access. Hồ sạch sẽ, hầu như k nghe mùi thuốc tẩy, nhân viên vớt rác thường xuyên hồ sạch và đẹp lắm.
Thang máy Schindler nhanh, gọn và mượt khỏi bàn. 
Tiếc 1 điểm ở tòa nhà này mùi xăng xe còn tồn lại ở tầng B khá nồng mỗi khi mình về, 
còn lại rất ưng nơi đây. 
Phòng 25m2 của mình không có máy giặt, không bếp. Vừa cho 2 người đúng  chỉ có nhu cầu nghỉ ngơi sau đi chơi cả ngày.  Drap giường sạch thơm, có nhu cầu thay mỗi ngày thì hãy báo bạn nhân viên nhá. 
Nói chung rất ưng 👌

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Host rất nice và supportive, nhà đẹp, location thuận tiện ngay trung tâm đường lớn

reviews.title: Great location and value for money
reviews.text:
Han is our host, he was very friendly and flexible. He allowed us to check out late at 3pm instead 12pm. Because our flight is not until 4pm. He is Just a phone call away for every time we need him. 
Room was very new and
clean with sea view. It’s close to everything. Great location, everything at your doorstep, bike hire, haircut, massage, cafe and restaurant etc.. walking distance to the beach. I’ll definitely come back.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is clean, and there is enough drinking water with hot water for bathing. The images of the room I booked match what is shown outside. The room price does not include breakfast, pool fees, or parking fees. The overnight parking fee is 40,000 VND, and each time in and out is 5,000 VND. If couples riding motorbikes can contact the owner to rent a bike directly, it will save them the parking fee in the building.

reviews.title: Very satisfied
reviews.text: My friend and I arrived early before 2 pm, so we were helped by the owner to store our luggage first and then I asked him to suggest some restaurants, he was very enthusiastic to help us. The room is clean, neat and fragrant (this is what I like very much). We planned to change our plane tickets to stay for 2 more nights but we couldn't arrange our work so we had to go back on schedule, next time I come here I will definitely book this room again. Highly recommended!
reviews.response:
Dear Lam!  Thank you for choosing Apec Sun Hotel Phu Yen for your stay in Phu Yen.
 Your satisfaction and reviews are the motivation for our hotel to be further improved.
 Wishing you a very healthy and happy new year.
 The hotel looks forward to welcoming you again in the near future.

reviews.title: 1 lovely hotel
reviews.text: The room is clean and has everything you need. The owner is super nice, everyone. I forgot to bring my phone charger, and he very kindly took care of me and lent me his charger. The security guards in the lobby are also very attentive and considerate 🥺. If you come to Phu Yen, you should visit here. The prices are reasonable, and the service is extremely good.
reviews.response:
Dear Thuy Linh! Cảm ơn bạn đã lựa chọn  khách sạn Apec Sun Hotel Phú Yên cho kỳ nghỉ tại Phú yên. 
Sự hài lòng và những đánh giá của bạn là động lực cho khách sạn mình được hoàn thiện tốt hơn nữa. 
Chúc bạn năm mới thật nhiều sức khoẻ và chuyến đi vui vẻ.
Khách sạn rất mong sẽ lại được chào đón bạn vào 1 dịp gần nhất.

reviews.title: Clean room
reviews.text:
This is not a hotel but a serviced apartment. So do not expect proper hotel's services like reception. The staff is very friendly, quick and helpful though.

The 2 queen-bed room is roomy enough for a group of 3 adults.

I got the ocean view apartment however its view is not direct into the ocean, it looks down the main square of the city instead. However the view is quite nice so i don't complain.

Room, garments, towels are clean and confortable.
reviews.response:
Dear Ky!  Thank you for choosing Apec Sun Hotel Phu Yen for your stay in Phu Yen.
 Your satisfaction and reviews are the motivation for our hotel to be further improved.
 Wishing you a very healthy and happy new year.
 The hotel looks forward to welcoming you again in the near future.

reviews.title: Good place and great services!
reviews.text: Recommend for family trip. The owner helped my family for very good advice of food location and service. 10stars for voting!

reviews.title: Family with young children
reviews.text: The central location near the sea makes it easy to travel to tourist spots in the North and South. The room has a beautiful view and is very new. There is also an additional kitchen design, which is very convenient for warming up food for children. There are 2 beautiful and chill swimming pools; the price does not include swimming services, but it is only 162k for the whole family to use the swimming pool and gym. It is really worth it. The owner is very enthusiastic and professional, providing detailed guidance. I went in the winter, so the weather in Phu Yen was cool and pleasantly sunny. It's a pity that there wasn't much sun, so the beach wasn't beautiful. Looking forward to seeing you again next summer.
reviews.response:
Dear Hoa! Cảm ơn bạn đã lựa chọn  khách sạn Apec Sun Hotel Phú Yên cho kỳ nghỉ tại Phú yên. 
Sự hài lòng và những đánh giá của bạn là động lực cho khách sạn mình được hoàn thiện tốt hơn nữa.

reviews.title: 2D1N team building
reviews.text: Spacious, clean, comfortable room with amenities, great view at night, suitable for family and group travel. Will come back regularly. 5 stars. 👍👍👍
reviews.response:

The hotel building is located in a prime area, very new and clean. The owner is very enthusiastic in providing support and guidance. The room rates are very reasonable for a vacation. If given the chance, I will definitely return to this place.

reviews.title: Bof!
reviews.text: Un hôtel très grand, avec un réceptionniste (quand on le trouve, mais comme il est multi-taches, il ne peut pas tout faire) qui ne parle que vietnamien. Literie moyenne (les matelas sont à ressorts et on les sent bien). Pour moi, c'est plus une usine qu'un hôtel.
reviews.room_type: Premier Sea View Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Excellente solution d'hébergement
reviews.text:
Séjour en novembre. Basse saison . Ce n'est pas la meilleure saison pour visiter de Vietnam en raison de pluies assez fréquentes.  Mais températures délicieuses.   De ce fait le prix de location est extrêmement non marché.  L'équipement de très bon niveau, les lits confortables,  la kitchenette est très appréciée. 
Même si ce n'est pas le  centre , la localisation n' en est pas loin. 
Et une partie des chambres à une super belle vue, la mer, la ville, la montagne.  Donc choisir une chambre des vies, et dans les étages élevés.

reviews.title: Propreté irréprochable, a recommander
reviews.text: Propre, immeuble récent, sécurisé et bien équipé !
reviews.response: Thank you Kevin for a wonderful stay at my Hotel.

reviews.title: Superbe!
reviews.text: Excellent rapport qualité prix! Tout était parfait!
reviews.response: Thank you for having a wonderful stay. We hope to serve you again next time. Thank you.

reviews.title: Très belle petite chambre au 25 eme étage
reviews.text:
Sublime vue de la chambre et du balcon sur la mer , la ville , la mibtsgne , la campagne .
Lit très comfortable . Chambre très propre et assez bien décorée . 
Personnel très réactif et sympathique . Sublime piscine rooftop . 
Une très agréable halte de luxe à Tuy Hoa .

reviews.title: Hände weg!
reviews.text: Ich kam um 22:30 an. An der Rezeption war niemand. Wenig später kreuzt ein Wachmann auf der mich skeptisch beäugt als wäre ich einen Einbrecher. Zum Glück bin ich in Vietnam und die Menschen sind sofort bereit zu helfen. Eine Dame ruft beim Rezeptionisten an der wenig später da ist. Ein sehr netter Mann der aber kein Wort englisch spricht oder versteht. Die Kommunikation verläuft schwierig. Er möchte meine WhatsApp Nummer haben damit ich Kontakt aufnehmen kann. Das ist im Grunde genommen prima. Nur steht er dabei in meinem Zimmer und es dauert eine gute Viertelstunde bis er mein Zimmer verlässt und ich endlich ankommen darf. Ich stelle fest: kein Duschgel, keine Seife, keine Löffel in den Kaffee umzurühren. Kein Stuhl weder im Zimmer noch auf dem Balkon. Die AC ist auf dem Balkon installiert und ist Mega laut! Das Hotel ist ein Riesen Bunker. Ich hatte es gewählt da  es Strandnähe aufzeigt und der Pool groß und lang genug ist zum Bahnen schwimmen. Jedoch ist die Nutzung nur nach Gebühr möglich. Gym genau so. Das Meer ist weiter weg als gedacht und du er Aussicht ist eher desolat und wirkt nicht gerade einladend. Meine Erfahrung: Finger weg. Es gibt für den Preis ein Zimmer mit Frühstück, was auch hier gefehlt hat!!!

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Angenehmer Aufenthalt. Vermieter und Personal sehr freundlich und bei Fragen sofort zur Stelle. Hervorragende Sicht zur Stadt, zum Umfeld und vor allem tolle Sicht zum Meer. Poolbenutzungen mit extra Bestellung und Bezahlung. 1 Pool von 2 war gesperrt. Viele Ess- und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten fußläufig zu erreichen.  Reinigung zwischendurch auf Anfrage möglich.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Bis auf 2 mal auf ein anderes Zimmer innerhalb von 4 Nächten umziehen,ist alles sehr gut gewesen😊 alles schnell erreichbar, zum Strand bisschen zu laufen ( wenn es nicht diese Hitze wäre,dann auch in Ordnung).Einrichtung modern,qualitativ gut.

reviews.title: Gut im zweiten Anlauf
reviews.text: Wir hatten erst leider ein Zimmer, dass nicht dem entsprach, welches wir gebucht hatten, zudem war dort der Rolladen in der Dusche geschimmelt. Wir konnten dies allerdings klären und bekamen ein anderes Zimmer. Auf Nachfrage erhielten wir auch eine Möglichkeit die Wäsche zum Trocknen aufzuhängen und Waschmittel für die Nutzung der Waschmaschine.

reviews.title: Klasse
reviews.text:
Alles bestens.
Personal absoluz gut

reviews.title: 고객들에게 교묘하게 사진짜집기로 사기?
reviews.text:
사진만 보고 여기 수영장 이랑 헬스장 무료 이용가능 하고 그리고 룸 컨디션 똑같다 생각하면 여행 첫날부터 망칩니다
일단 이 건물 호텔 외에 에어비엔비 식으로 쪼개진 숙박 형태입니다
리셉션 없구요.  개인이 와서 숙소 안내해주고
키 주고 갑니다
당신이 보고 있는 수영장2곳 과 헬스장은 이용가능한데 돈을 내야 합니다. 하루에 12만동조식 당연히 없구요. 조식은 인당 25만동 그리고 호텔 손님이 아닌  숙박하는 손님들은 오토바이 주차비 내야합니다 하루주차비 3ㅡ4동 입니다
사진과 전혀 다른 서비스 제공과 룸 컨디션 입니다
그냥 수영장 헬스장 조식등 빠진 상태인걸 알고 간거면 괜찮지만 그게 아니라면 정말 사기당한 느낌일겁니다
광고를 진짜 사람 속이게 교묘하게 찍었네요 
위치 빼고는 진짜 별한개도 아까운 곳이었네요

reviews.title: Rất bất tiện
reviews.text: Đây là căn hộ cho thuê chứ không phải khách sạn, ưu điểm duy nhất là ở trung tâm. Phí gửi xe khá đắt, đi du lịch nhóm thuê nhiều phòng cũng cực kì bất tiện, không được gửi đồ để đi chơi chờ checkin

reviews.title: Đánh giá chung 1 đêm nghỉ ở Apec
reviews.text: Mình bỏ ra 1tr5/đêm nhưng nhận lại dịch vụ không xứng đáng với số tiền mình đã chi. Căn hộ sạch sẽ nhưng tiện nghi không đủ. Vd: Dao cạo râu, Lược, v.v... Vì hôm đó mình ở không có chỗ đậu xe trước khách sạn nên đã đậu ở hầm từ 9h30 tối đến 6h50 sáng mình đi thì tổng tiền gửi xe là 160k. Mọi người nên cân nhắc khi ở đây với giá tiền này.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Chất lượng chưa tốt so với thương hiệu
reviews.response: Kính gửi Quý khách, Cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian để đóng góp về chất lượng dịch vụ tại khách sạn Apec Sun Phu Yen. Những đóng góp của Quý khách sẽ giúp chúng tôi cải thiện dịch vụ mỗi ngày. Chúng tôi xin chân thành xin lỗi về những bất tiện mà Quý khách đã gặp phải trong suốt quá trình lưu trú tại khách sạn. Chúng tôi đã nghiêm túc xem xét lại những bất cập mà quý khách đã nhắc đến và sẽ có những biện pháp khắc phục kịp thời.  Chúc Quý khách có thật nhiều sức khỏe, hạnh phúc và bình an. Chúng tôi rất mong sẽ lại được chào đón Quý khách vào một dịp gần nhất.  Trân trọng.

Giá phòng đặt có khuyến mãi gần 1 triệu 1 đêm nhưng ko có bufer, muốn sử dụng hồ bơi phải bỏ thêm chi phí mua vé nên mọi người lưu ý khi đặt phòng nhé. Bạn nhân viên thì khá dễ thương.

reviews.text: Ổn

reviews.title: Phòng ốc khác xa minh họa
reviews.text:
Đây là một nơi lưu trú mới và cơ sở vật chất vẫn chưa được hoàn thiện từ tầng hầm lên đến sảnh đón và cả phòng nghỉ. Quá khó hiểu khi gắn 5 sao và giá không hề rẻ :
- Đặt phòng một đằng nhưng lúc nhận phòng 1 nẻo. Đặt phòng hạng VIP với diện tích 42m2 nhưng lúc nhận phòng chỉ được 32m2 ( đã có đo ).
- Phòng có ăn sáng nhưng lúc xuống thì được bảo là phòng ko bào gồm ăn sáng .
- Dù nơi lưu trú mới nhưng sofa sờn, thậm chí có luôn cả "vết tích" của khách lưu trú trước đó mà không hề vệ sinh. Vòi tắm thì lúc được lúc mất.
- Không hề báo trước cho khác là sử dụng hầm để xe mất phí. Phí cũng không hề " vui vẻ" tí nào, cụ thể là gửi 1 chiếc xe máy từ 9h tối đến 7h30 sáng thì có giá "hữu nghị" là 40K.
Đề nghị Agoda xem lại

reviews.title: Good

reviews.response: Cảm ơn sự đóng của chị, phòng của chị đặt 1 phần có hướng Biển là đúng. nhưng phòng chị chỉ giới hạng ở được 2 người. nhưng chị đi 4 người lớn. Nên bên ks đã đổi nâng cấp miễn phí cho chị free lên hạng phòng 4 người có ban công mà không mất chi phí thêm.

reviews.title: Chỗ nghỉ tốt
reviews.text:
Gia đình có trẻ nhỏ nên thấy hơi nhiều bụi, còn lại mọi thứ rất tốt
Yên tĩnh, thoãi mái, đẹp, giá cả hợp lý.
Recommend!

reviews.title: Chưa hoàn thiện lắm
reviews.text: Giá phòng sale tạm được, vị trí trung tâm nhưng xa biển. Là căn hộ dịch vụ chứ KO phải ksan cùng tên nên khác hẳn. Đi lại trong toà nhà khá bất cập vì phải cần thẻ đi thang máy. Phòng mình ở điều hoà không mát lắm và làm mát khi bật lại khá yếu,  có bếp mà ko có nồi để nấu (nếu cần). Nói chung thấy khá mới và rate cao thì thử nhưng ko được như kì vọng. À đặc biệt gửi xe qua đêm trong toà nhà siêu đắt nên khá là khó chịu.

reviews.title: Phòng condotel rất sạch sẽ, giá phù hợp và vị trí khá ok
reviews.text:
Phòng sạch sẽ, đẹp, gần bãi biển và xung quanh cũng có nhiều cửa hàng buôn bán sầm uất.
Chỉ có 1 điều là hơi đông nên thang máy hơi quá tải và phải chờ lâu. Check in-out hơi lâu vì phải gọi bạn quản lý phòng chứ bảo vệ ở dưới không hỗ trợ gì.

reviews.title: Du lịch Phú Yên tự túc
reviews.text:
Giá phòng cũng hợp lý (lobby hơi xuống cấp, thang máy hơi stupid), được cái phòng cũng sạch sẽ ok
Nhân viên tất cả ok, giữ xe miễn phí
Vị trí đắc địa, dễ đi tham quan vòng vòng thành phố Tuy Hoà

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Tốt

reviews.title: 3 ngày 2 đêm tại Tuy Hoà
reviews.text: Trải nghiệm tốt với Apec, gần các địa điểm du lịch và ăn uống
reviews.response:
Dear Hung! Cảm ơn bạn đã lựa chọn khách sạn Apec Sun Hotel Phú Yên cho kỳ nghỉ tại Phú yên. 
Sự hài lòng và những đánh giá của bạn là động lực cho khách sạn mình được hoàn thiện tốt hơn nữa. 
Chúc bạn thật nhiều sức khoẻ và chuyến đi vui vẻ.
Khách sạn rất mong sẽ lại được chào đón bạn vào 1 dịp gần nhất.

reviews.title: Vượt mọi mong đợi
reviews.text: Khách sạn khá mới, phòng ốc sạch sẽ, đặc biệt là nhà tắm, giường siêu thích. Khu vực trước cửa kháng sạn có bãi đỗ xe và cho thuê xe tiện lợi, đi lại dễ dàng. Check in và out nhanh chóng, nhân viên cũng nice. Chắc chắn sẽ ở lại Đây khi đến Phú Yên

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Tiện nghi sạch sẽ. Bạn chủ cũng rất support và rất chu đáo hỗ trợ mình.
